per_query.question: When did Caroline go to the LGBTQ support group?

candidate_entries.abstract: On 12 Jul 2023, Caroline shared that an LGBTQ conference reinforced her commitment to trans rights and motivated her to pursue a counseling/mental-health career.
candidate_entries.overview: On 12 July 2023, Caroline told Melanie she attended an LGBTQ conference two days earlier and felt welcomed, accepted, and connected with others on similar journeys. The experience strengthened her belief in advocating for trans rights and spreading awareness, while noting there is still progress to be made. Caroline said she is exploring counseling and mental health jobs, motivated by her own past mental health struggles and the support she received. She described books as central to her personal journey and motivation, and named "Becoming Nicole" by Amy Ellis Nutt as especially impactful. Caroline said the book taught her self-acceptance, finding support, and holding onto hope through hard times, and she mentioned that pets bring joy and comfort. Melanie shared she has a dog and a cat.

candidate_entries.abstract: Caroline is organizing an LGBTQ art show next month where she will exhibit her paintings to promote understanding and acceptance.
candidate_entries.overview: On Aug 25, 2023 at 1:33 pm, Caroline shared that she is putting together an LGBTQ art show scheduled for next month. She plans to display her own paintings in the show. Melanie responded with support and excitement, emphasizing the need for more platforms for the LGBTQ community. Caroline said the event will feature LGBTQ artists and their talents. The stated goal of the show is to spread understanding and acceptance. An image was shared showing a poster for a concert featuring a man in a cowboy hat.

candidate_entries.abstract: On 20 Jul 2023, Caroline shared she joined the “Connected LGBTQ Activists” group to support LGBTQ rights, while Melanie described recent family beach and camping traditions.
candidate_entries.overview: On 17 Jul 2023, Melanie complimented Caroline’s artwork and mentioned she and her kids finished another painting. On 20 Jul 2023, Caroline reconnected and said she joined a new LGBTQ activist group the previous Tuesday. Caroline named the group “Connected LGBTQ Activists” and described regular meetings plus planning events and campaigns to support LGBTQ rights and each other. She noted a city pride parade happened the prior weekend, which she missed but found encouraging for equality and inclusivity. Melanie shared a recent beach trip with her children, noting they go once or twice a year, and showed photos of kids with a kite and a sandcastle. Melanie also described an annual family camping trip and a standout memory from last year seeing the Perseid meteor shower while making wishes.

candidate_entries.abstract: On May 8, 2023, Caroline shared that an LGBTQ support group helped her feel accepted and she plans to pursue education toward counseling/mental health work.
candidate_entries.overview: On May 8, 2023, Caroline and Melanie chatted about life updates. Caroline said she attended an LGBTQ support group the day before and found it powerful, especially the transgender stories. She reported the group made her feel accepted and gave her courage to embrace herself. Caroline said she plans to continue her education and explore career options. She is particularly interested in counseling or mental health work to support people with similar issues. Melanie encouraged her and also shared a lake-sunrise painting she made last year as a creative outlet.

candidate_entries.abstract: On July 3, 2023, Caroline shared that attending Pride renewed her commitment to pursue counseling/mental health work to help the LGBTQ+ community.
candidate_entries.overview: On July 3, 2023, Caroline told Melanie she attended an LGBTQ+ pride parade and felt a strong sense of belonging and community growth. The experience motivated Caroline to use her personal story to help others, reinforcing her interest in counseling and mental health. Melanie shared she had just signed up for a pottery class, describing it as therapeutic and emotionally expressive, and showed photos including a finished black-and-white floral bowl she made. Caroline said she is learning piano as her own creative outlet and encouraged Melanie’s pottery journey. Caroline also said she plans to attend a transgender conference later that month to meet community members and learn more about advocacy. They ended the conversation with Melanie wishing Caroline safety and asking for updates after the conference.

candidate_entries.abstract: On Aug 28, 2023, Caroline shared her ongoing volunteer work at an LGBTQ+ youth center, including planning a talent show next month.
candidate_entries.overview: On Aug 28, 2023, Caroline and Melanie caught up via chat. Melanie shared she took her kids to a park the day before, and she included a playground photo. Caroline described volunteering at an LGBTQ+ youth center as fulfilling and emotionally meaningful, noting she connected with the youth by sharing her own story. Caroline decided she will continue volunteering there and said they are organizing a talent show for the kids next month. Melanie shared photos from a live concert she attended and said the band was named "Summer Sounds," playing an upbeat pop song that got the crowd dancing.

retrieved_content: On 17 Jul 2023, Melanie complimented Caroline’s artwork and mentioned she and her kids finished another painting. On 20 Jul 2023, Caroline reconnected and said she joined a new LGBTQ activist group the previous Tuesday. Caroline named the group “Connected LGBTQ Activists” and described regular meetings plus planning events and campaigns to support LGBTQ rights and each other. She noted a city pride parade happened the prior weekend, which she missed but found encouraging for equality and inclusivity. Melanie shared a recent beach trip with her children, noting they go once or twice a year, and showed photos of kids with a kite and a sandcastle. Melanie also described an annual family camping trip and a standout memory from last year seeing the Perseid meteor shower while making wishes.

On 12 July 2023, Caroline told Melanie she attended an LGBTQ conference two days earlier and felt welcomed, accepted, and connected with others on similar journeys. The experience strengthened her belief in advocating for trans rights and spreading awareness, while noting there is still progress to be made. Caroline said she is exploring counseling and mental health jobs, motivated by her own past mental health struggles and the support she received. She described books as central to her personal journey and motivation, and named "Becoming Nicole" by Amy Ellis Nutt as especially impactful. Caroline said the book taught her self-acceptance, finding support, and holding onto hope through hard times, and she mentioned that pets bring joy and comfort. Melanie shared she has a dog and a cat.

On May 8, 2023, Caroline and Melanie chatted about life updates. Caroline said she attended an LGBTQ support group the day before and found it powerful, especially the transgender stories. She reported the group made her feel accepted and gave her courage to embrace herself. Caroline said she plans to continue her education and explore career options. She is particularly interested in counseling or mental health work to support people with similar issues. Melanie encouraged her and also shared a lake-sunrise painting she made last year as a creative outlet.

On 25 May 2023, Melanie reassured Caroline that she has a caring heart and can provide love and stability in a new chapter. On 9 June 2023, Caroline told Melanie about a school event where she spoke about her transgender journey and encouraged students to engage with the LGBTQ community. Caroline reflected that she began transitioning three years earlier and described feeling empowered while sharing struggles and growth since coming out. Melanie repeatedly praised Caroline’s courage and impact in promoting inclusion and allyship. Melanie shared she wants to be courageous for her family and asked what motivates Caroline. Caroline said friends, family, and mentors motivate her, and she shared a photo from a meetup the previous week; Melanie asked how long Caroline has had that support system.

On Aug 25, 2023 at 1:33 pm, Caroline shared that she is putting together an LGBTQ art show scheduled for next month. She plans to display her own paintings in the show. Melanie responded with support and excitement, emphasizing the need for more platforms for the LGBTQ community. Caroline said the event will feature LGBTQ artists and their talents. The stated goal of the show is to spread understanding and acceptance. An image was shared showing a poster for a concert featuring a man in a cowboy hat.

On 13 September 2023 at 12:09 am, Caroline and Melanie catch up after a long time. Caroline shares a beach sunset photo and describes a recent biking day out with friends. Melanie shares a photo from a camping trip with her kids, mentioning forest hiking, marshmallows, and campfire stories. Caroline says her volunteering is motivated by making a difference for the LGBTQ+ community and is supported by friends, family, and mentors, which also fuels her art. They discuss their art histories: Caroline has made art since about age 17, while Melanie has practiced for seven years and focuses on painting and pottery, sharing a photo of bowls. Caroline shares that art helped her explore gender identity and was important during her transition; she also presents a painting symbolizing her path as a trans woman using red/blue to represent and challenge the gender binary. Melanie expresses pride in Caroline and asks how her journey has affected her relationships.

On Aug 28, 2023, Caroline and Melanie caught up via chat. Melanie shared she took her kids to a park the day before, and she included a playground photo. Caroline described volunteering at an LGBTQ+ youth center as fulfilling and emotionally meaningful, noting she connected with the youth by sharing her own story. Caroline decided she will continue volunteering there and said they are organizing a talent show for the kids next month. Melanie shared photos from a live concert she attended and said the band was named "Summer Sounds," playing an upbeat pop song that got the crowd dancing.

On 17 July 2023, Melanie and Caroline chatted about recent activities. Melanie mentioned a quiet weekend after a family camping trip two weekends earlier. Caroline said she joined a mentorship program for LGBTQ youth and is mentoring a transgender teen like herself. Caroline described attending an LGBT pride event last month and highlighted her mentee’s reaction to the public support and acceptance. Caroline also shared plans to hold an LGBTQ art show next month featuring her paintings. She showed a painting (tree with bright sun) and said it was inspired by a visit to an LGBTQ center, aiming to capture unity and strength.

On June 27, 2023, Caroline and Melanie reconnected and discussed sentimental objects and recent life updates. Caroline showed a necklace gifted by her grandmother in Sweden, symbolizing love, faith, and strength and reminding her of her roots. She also mentioned a hand-painted bowl made by a friend for her 18th birthday about ten years earlier. Melanie shared that she recently took her family camping in the mountains, where they roasted marshmallows and hiked to a scenic view. Caroline then shared a career direction: she is exploring counseling and mental health work, motivated by her own journey and the support she received. She attended an LGBTQ+ counseling workshop the previous Friday and is considering specializing in supporting trans people by creating safe, affirming spaces.

On July 3, 2023, Caroline told Melanie she attended an LGBTQ+ pride parade and felt a strong sense of belonging and community growth. The experience motivated Caroline to use her personal story to help others, reinforcing her interest in counseling and mental health. Melanie shared she had just signed up for a pottery class, describing it as therapeutic and emotionally expressive, and showed photos including a finished black-and-white floral bowl she made. Caroline said she is learning piano as her own creative outlet and encouraged Melanie’s pottery journey. Caroline also said she plans to attend a transgender conference later that month to meet community members and learn more about advocacy. They ended the conversation with Melanie wishing Caroline safety and asking for updates after the conference.

evidence_texts: Caroline: I went to a LGBTQ support group yesterday and it was so powerful.

per_query.question: When did Melanie paint a sunrise?

candidate_entries.abstract: On July 20, 2023, Melanie shared awe-filled memories of a meteor shower and her youngest child’s first steps, emphasizing gratitude for her family.
candidate_entries.overview: On 20 July 2023 at 8:56 pm, Melanie told Caroline about a night with a clear, star-filled sky and an amazing meteor shower that made her feel small and in awe of the universe. Caroline reacted enthusiastically and asked Melanie to share other memories that make her feel thankful for life. Melanie recalled the day her youngest child took her first steps, describing it as a perspective-shifting milestone about how fleeting life is. Both agreed such milestones highlight how special family bonds are. Melanie concluded that these moments make her appreciate life and feel lucky to have her family’s joy and love. The shared images depict a plane with a smoke trail, a beach with footprints, a baby in a crib, and a family at sunset on a beach.

candidate_entries.abstract: On Aug 17, 2023, Caroline shared a hurtful hiking incident about LGBTQ bias, and she and Melanie supported each other while celebrating Melanie’s new pottery bowl.
candidate_entries.overview: On Aug 17, 2023, Caroline told Melanie about a distressing hike where religious conservatives upset her, reinforcing how much work remains for LGBTQ rights. Melanie responded with empathy and noted how important strong support systems are. Melanie shared a photo of a newly finished pottery bowl with colorful patterns and asked for feedback. Caroline praised the bowl and asked what inspired the colors and patterns; Melanie said she loves bold designs and that painting helps her express feelings and creativity. They reaffirmed mutual appreciation for their friendship and how they help each other through life’s struggles. Caroline referenced having fun together at a Pride fest last year and shared a related group photo.

candidate_entries.abstract: On Oct 13, 2023, Caroline shared plans to pursue adoption while Melanie discussed an injury setback and showed two calming paintings inspired by sunsets and tranquility.
candidate_entries.overview: On 13 October 2023 at 10:31 am, Caroline told Melanie she contacted her mentor for adoption advice and feels ready to adopt. Melanie said a friend adopted last year, describing it as a long process but ultimately very happy, and asked Caroline for tips. Caroline advised researching agencies or lawyers, gathering documents (references, financial info, medical checks), and preparing emotionally for a difficult wait. Melanie then shared a recent setback: she was hurt last month and had to pause pottery, which she uses for self-expression. To cope, Melanie has been reading a book Caroline previously recommended and painting instead. Melanie shared a sunset-inspired painting and an abstract blue painting aimed at conveying tranquility.

candidate_entries.abstract: [6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Melanie]: Thanks, Caroline!
candidate_entries.overview:
[6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Melanie]: Thanks, Caroline! Yup, we just did it yesterday! The kids loved it and it was a nice way to relax after the road trip.

[6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Caroline]: Glad you got some R&R after the drive. Nature sure seems to refresh us, huh?

[6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Melanie]: Absolutely! It really helps me reset and recharge. I love camping trips with my fam, 'cause nature brings such peace and serenity. [image: a photo of a sunset over a body of water]

[6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Caroline]: Wow, that's awesome! What do you love most about camping with your fam?

[6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Melanie]: It's a chance to be present and together. We bond over stories, campfires and nature. It's so peaceful waking up to the sound of birds and the smell of fresh air - it always refreshes my soul.

[6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Caroline]: That's so peaceful and calming, Melanie! I can picture waking up to nature. It's great that you get to spend quality, tranquil time with your family.

[6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Melanie]: Thanks, Caroline! This is a great time. Nature and quality time, can't beat it!

candidate_entries.abstract: [1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023] [Caroline]: Thanks, Mel!
candidate_entries.overview:
[1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023] [Caroline]: Thanks, Mel! I made this stained glass window to remind myself and others that within us all is the key to discovering our true potential and living our best life. [image: a photo of three stained glass windows in a church with a clock]

[1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023] [Melanie]: Wow, Caroline, that looks amazing! What inspired it?

[1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023] [Caroline]: Thanks! It was made for a local church and shows time changing our lives. I made it to show my own journey as a transgender woman and how we should accept growth and change. [image: a photo of a large stained glass window in a church]

[1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023] [Melanie]: Wow, Caroline!  All those colors are incredible and the story it tells is so inspiring. [image: a photo of a door with a stained glass window and a coat rack]

[1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023] [Caroline]: Thanks, Mel! Glad you like it. It's a symbol of togetherness, to celebrate differences and be that much closer. I'd love to make something like this next! [image: a photo of a painted sidewalk with a rainbow design on it]

[1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023] [Melanie]: Wow, that's gorgeous! Where did you find it?

Caroline praised the bowl and asked what inspired the colors and patterns; Melanie said she loves bold designs and that painting helps her express feelings and creativity. They reaffirmed mutual appreciation for their friendship and how they help each other through life’s struggles. Caroline referenced having fun together at a Pride fest last year and shared a related group photo.

candidate_entries.abstract: On Oct 13, 2023, Caroline shared plans to pursue adoption while Melanie discussed an injury setback and showed two calming paintings inspired by sunsets and tranquility.
candidate_entries.overview: On 13 October 2023 at 10:31 am, Caroline told Melanie she contacted her mentor for adoption advice and feels ready to adopt. Melanie said a friend adopted last year, describing it as a long process but ultimately very happy, and asked Caroline for tips. Caroline advised researching agencies or lawyers, gathering documents (references, financial info, medical checks), and preparing emotionally for a difficult wait. Melanie then shared a recent setback: she was hurt last month and had to pause pottery, which she uses for self-expression. To cope, Melanie has been reading a book Caroline previously recommended and painting instead. Melanie shared a sunset-inspired painting and an abstract blue painting aimed at conveying tranquility.

candidate_entries.abstract: [6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Melanie]: Thanks, Caroline!
candidate_entries.overview:
[6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Melanie]: Thanks, Caroline! Yup, we just did it yesterday! The kids loved it and it was a nice way to relax after the road trip.

[6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Caroline]: Glad you got some R&R after the drive. Nature sure seems to refresh us, huh?

[6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Melanie]: Absolutely! It really helps me reset and recharge. I love camping trips with my fam, 'cause nature brings such peace and serenity. [image: a photo of a sunset over a body of water]

[6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Caroline]: Wow, that's awesome! What do you love most about camping with your fam?

[6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Melanie]: It's a chance to be present and together. We bond over stories, campfires and nature. It's so peaceful waking up to the sound of birds and the smell of fresh air - it always refreshes my soul.

[6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Caroline]: That's so peaceful and calming, Melanie! I can picture waking up to nature. It's great that you get to spend quality, tranquil time with your family.

[6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Melanie]: Thanks, Caroline! This is a great time. Nature and quality time, can't beat it!

candidate_entries.abstract: [1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023] [Caroline]: Thanks, Mel!
candidate_entries.overview:
[1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023] [Caroline]: Thanks, Mel! I made this stained glass window to remind myself and others that within us all is the key to discovering our true potential and living our best life. [image: a photo of three stained glass windows in a church with a clock]

[1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023] [Melanie]: Wow, Caroline, that looks amazing! What inspired it?

[1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023] [Caroline]: Thanks! It was made for a local church and shows time changing our lives. I made it to show my own journey as a transgender woman and how we should accept growth and change. [image: a photo of a large stained glass window in a church]

[1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023] [Melanie]: Wow, Caroline!  All those colors are incredible and the story it tells is so inspiring. [image: a photo of a door with a stained glass window and a coat rack]

[1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023] [Caroline]: Thanks, Mel! Glad you like it. It's a symbol of togetherness, to celebrate differences and be that much closer. I'd love to make something like this next! [image: a photo of a painted sidewalk with a rainbow design on it]

[1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023] [Melanie]: Wow, that's gorgeous! Where did you find it?

candidate_entries.abstract: On 13 Sep 2023, Caroline and Melanie reconnect, share nature photos, and discuss how art supports Caroline’s trans journey and Melanie’s pottery practice.
candidate_entries.overview: On 13 September 2023 at 12:09 am, Caroline and Melanie catch up after a long time. Caroline shares a beach sunset photo and describes a recent biking day out with friends. Melanie shares a photo from a camping trip with her kids, mentioning forest hiking, marshmallows, and campfire stories. Caroline says her volunteering is motivated by making a difference for the LGBTQ+ community and is supported by friends, family, and mentors, which also fuels her art. They discuss their art histories: Caroline has made art since about age 17, while Melanie has practiced for seven years and focuses on painting and pottery, sharing a photo of bowls. Caroline shares that art helped her explore gender identity and was important during her transition; she also presents a painting symbolizing her path as a trans woman using red/blue to represent and challenge the gender binary. Melanie expresses pride in Caroline and asks how her journey has affected her relationships.

candidate_entries.abstract: On July 20, 2023, Melanie shared awe-filled memories of a meteor shower and her youngest child’s first steps, emphasizing gratitude for her family.
candidate_entries.overview: On 20 July 2023 at 8:56 pm, Melanie told Caroline about a night with a clear, star-filled sky and an amazing meteor shower that made her feel small and in awe of the universe. Caroline reacted enthusiastically and asked Melanie to share other memories that make her feel thankful for life. Melanie recalled the day her youngest child took her first steps, describing it as a perspective-shifting milestone about how fleeting life is. Both agreed such milestones highlight how special family bonds are. Melanie concluded that these moments make her appreciate life and feel lucky to have her family’s joy and love. The shared images depict a plane with a smoke trail, a beach with footprints, a baby in a crib, and a family at sunset on a beach.

On May 8, 2023, Caroline and Melanie chatted about life updates. Caroline said she attended an LGBTQ support group the day before and found it powerful, especially the transgender stories. She reported the group made her feel accepted and gave her courage to embrace herself. Caroline said she plans to continue her education and explore career options. She is particularly interested in counseling or mental health work to support people with similar issues. Melanie encouraged her and also shared a lake-sunrise painting she made last year as a creative outlet.

On Aug 17, 2023, Caroline told Melanie about a distressing hike where religious conservatives upset her, reinforcing how much work remains for LGBTQ rights. Melanie responded with empathy and noted how important strong support systems are. Melanie shared a photo of a newly finished pottery bowl with colorful patterns and asked for feedback. Caroline praised the bowl and asked what inspired the colors and patterns; Melanie said she loves bold designs and that painting helps her express feelings and creativity. They reaffirmed mutual appreciation for their friendship and how they help each other through life’s struggles. Caroline referenced having fun together at a Pride fest last year and shared a related group photo.

Melanie shares a photo from a camping trip with her kids, mentioning forest hiking, marshmallows, and campfire stories. Caroline says her volunteering is motivated by making a difference for the LGBTQ+ community and is supported by friends, family, and mentors, which also fuels her art. Melanie expresses pride in Caroline and asks how her journey has affected her relationships.

On 20 July 2023 at 8:56 pm, Melanie told Caroline about a night with a clear, star-filled sky and an amazing meteor shower that made her feel small and in awe of the universe. Caroline reacted enthusiastically and asked Melanie to share other memories that make her feel thankful for life. Melanie recalled the day her youngest child took her first steps, describing it as a perspective-shifting milestone about how fleeting life is. Both agreed such milestones highlight how special family bonds are. Melanie concluded that these moments make her appreciate life and feel lucky to have her family’s joy and love. The shared images depict a plane with a smoke trail, a beach with footprints, a baby in a crib, and a family at sunset on a beach.

On 25 August 2023 at 1:33 pm, Caroline told Melanie she went hiking last week, got into a bad situation with some people, and attempted to apologize. Melanie shared she made a flower-themed plate in a pottery class the day before and asked if Caroline had tried pottery. Caroline shared a recently finished painting inspired by a beach visit last week, aiming to capture the calming sunset over the ocean. They reflected on how art creates connection and shared emotional resonance. Melanie mentioned volunteering with her family at a homeless shelter the previous day and feeling it helped make a difference despite the difficulty. Melanie asked about Caroline’s transition; Caroline emphasized the importance of acceptance and support in the transgender community and explained the meaning of a rainbow-flag mural and an eagle symbolizing freedom, pride, and resilience. Melanie ended by asking whether Caroline had made any more art lately.

On 17 July 2023, Melanie and Caroline chatted about recent activities. Melanie mentioned a quiet weekend after a family camping trip two weekends earlier. Caroline said she joined a mentorship program for LGBTQ youth and is mentoring a transgender teen like herself. Caroline described attending an LGBT pride event last month and highlighted her mentee’s reaction to the public support and acceptance. Caroline also shared plans to hold an LGBTQ art show next month featuring her paintings. She showed a painting (tree with bright sun) and said it was inspired by a visit to an LGBTQ center, aiming to capture unity and strength.

On 15 July 2023, Caroline and Melanie caught up after a busy week. Melanie described taking her kids to a pottery workshop where they made clay pieces, including a cup with a dog face. Melanie also shared that they have been painting together lately, including a nature-themed sunset with a palm tree, and noticing flowers outdoors. Caroline said she attended a council meeting related to adoption on the prior Friday and felt inspired and more determined to adopt. They discussed flowers and their meanings; Caroline noted blue is her favorite color and finds it relaxing. Melanie said flowers symbolize joy and growth for her and were central to her wedding decor, and she highlighted that marrying her partner was the best part of her wedding.

On July 15, 2023 at 1:51 pm, Caroline and Melanie chatted about family activities and support. Caroline asked what Melanie’s family likes doing together, referencing a photo of a family walking through a forest with a toddler. Melanie said they enjoy hiking in the mountains and exploring forests as a way to connect with nature and each other. Caroline responded positively, emphasizing how special nature exploration and family time are. Melanie shared that these outings are among her favorite memories and said they bring happiness and togetherness. The conversation ended with both affirming their friendship and support and Caroline wishing Melanie a good day.

On 17 Jul 2023, Melanie complimented Caroline’s artwork and mentioned she and her kids finished another painting. On 20 Jul 2023, Caroline reconnected and said she joined a new LGBTQ activist group the previous Tuesday. Caroline named the group “Connected LGBTQ Activists” and described regular meetings plus planning events and campaigns to support LGBTQ rights and each other. She noted a city pride parade happened the prior weekend, which she missed but found encouraging for equality and inclusivity. Melanie shared a recent beach trip with her children, noting they go once or twice a year, and showed photos of kids with a kite and a sandcastle. Melanie also described an annual family camping trip and a standout memory from last year seeing the Perseid meteor shower while making wishes.

candidate_entries.abstract: On 6 Jul 2023, Caroline shared her interest in counseling work and described strong support from friends and family during her transition while catching up with Melanie.
candidate_entries.overview: On 6 July 2023, Caroline and Melanie reconnected and shared life updates. Caroline said she has been looking more into counseling or mental health work because she wants to help people and make a positive impact. Melanie described taking her kids to a museum the day before, where they were excited about the dinosaur exhibit. Caroline is building a children’s library for future kids, stocking classics, multicultural stories, and educational books, and asked Melanie about her childhood favorite. Melanie named "Charlotte's Web" as a favorite and highlighted its themes of friendship and compassion. Caroline connected those themes to her own life, explaining that friends and family have been helping her through her transition and mentioning a picnic with them the prior week. Melanie also shared that her family enjoys beach camping together and posted a photo from a campfire on the beach.

candidate_entries.abstract: On Aug 28, 2023, Caroline shared her ongoing volunteer work at an LGBTQ+ youth center, including planning a talent show next month.
candidate_entries.overview: On Aug 28, 2023, Caroline and Melanie caught up via chat. Melanie shared she took her kids to a park the day before, and she included a playground photo. Caroline described volunteering at an LGBTQ+ youth center as fulfilling and emotionally meaningful, noting she connected with the youth by sharing her own story. Caroline decided she will continue volunteering there and said they are organizing a talent show for the kids next month. Melanie shared photos from a live concert she attended and said the band was named "Summer Sounds," playing an upbeat pop song that got the crowd dancing.

candidate_entries.overview: On Oct 22, 2023, Caroline told Melanie she passed adoption agency interviews the prior Friday and is excited about progressing toward adoption. Caroline described her long-term vision as building her own family by providing a safe, loving home to kids who have lacked one. She framed adoption as a way to give back and to practice love and acceptance for chosen families as well as blood families. Caroline also shared that her transition and self-acceptance were difficult, but support from friends, family, and role models helped her through it. She wants to pass that support forward by helping others grow and find comfort. Melanie expressed encouragement throughout and affirmed mutual support.

retrieved_content: On 6 July 2023, Caroline and Melanie reconnected and shared life updates. Caroline said she has been looking more into counseling or mental health work because she wants to help people and make a positive impact. Melanie described taking her kids to a museum the day before, where they were excited about the dinosaur exhibit. Caroline is building a children’s library for future kids, stocking classics, multicultural stories, and educational books, and asked Melanie about her childhood favorite. Melanie named "Charlotte's Web" as a favorite and highlighted its themes of friendship and compassion. Caroline connected those themes to her own life, explaining that friends and family have been helping her through her transition and mentioning a picnic with them the prior week. Melanie also shared that her family enjoys beach camping together and posted a photo from a campfire on the beach.

On May 8, 2023, Caroline and Melanie chatted about life updates. Caroline said she attended an LGBTQ support group the day before and found it powerful, especially the transgender stories. She reported the group made her feel accepted and gave her courage to embrace herself. Caroline said she plans to continue her education and explore career options. She is particularly interested in counseling or mental health work to support people with similar issues. Melanie encouraged her and also shared a lake-sunrise painting she made last year as a creative outlet.

On 13 October 2023 at 10:31 am, Caroline told Melanie she contacted her mentor for adoption advice and feels ready to adopt. Melanie said a friend adopted last year, describing it as a long process but ultimately very happy, and asked Caroline for tips. Caroline advised researching agencies or lawyers, gathering documents (references, financial info, medical checks), and preparing emotionally for a difficult wait. Melanie then shared a recent setback: she was hurt last month and had to pause pottery, which she uses for self-expression. To cope, Melanie has been reading a book Caroline previously recommended and painting instead. Melanie shared a sunset-inspired painting and an abstract blue painting aimed at conveying tranquility.

On 15 July 2023, Caroline and Melanie caught up after a busy week. Melanie described taking her kids to a pottery workshop where they made clay pieces, including a cup with a dog face. Melanie also shared that they have been painting together lately, including a nature-themed sunset with a palm tree, and noticing flowers outdoors. Caroline said she attended a council meeting related to adoption on the prior Friday and felt inspired and more determined to adopt. They discussed flowers and their meanings; Caroline noted blue is her favorite color and finds it relaxing. Melanie said flowers symbolize joy and growth for her and were central to her wedding decor, and she highlighted that marrying her partner was the best part of her wedding.

On Oct 22, 2023, Caroline told Melanie she passed adoption agency interviews the prior Friday and is excited about progressing toward adoption. Caroline described her long-term vision as building her own family by providing a safe, loving home to kids who have lacked one. She framed adoption as a way to give back and to practice love and acceptance for chosen families as well as blood families. Caroline also shared that her transition and self-acceptance were difficult, but support from friends, family, and role models helped her through it. She wants to pass that support forward by helping others grow and find comfort. Melanie expressed encouragement throughout and affirmed mutual support.

On 12 July 2023, Caroline told Melanie she attended an LGBTQ conference two days earlier and felt welcomed, accepted, and connected with others on similar journeys. The experience strengthened her belief in advocating for trans rights and spreading awareness, while noting there is still progress to be made. Caroline said she is exploring counseling and mental health jobs, motivated by her own past mental health struggles and the support she received. She described books as central to her personal journey and motivation, and named "Becoming Nicole" by Amy Ellis Nutt as especially impactful. Caroline said the book taught her self-acceptance, finding support, and holding onto hope through hard times, and she mentioned that pets bring joy and comfort. Melanie shared she has a dog and a cat.

On Aug 28, 2023, Caroline and Melanie caught up via chat. Melanie shared she took her kids to a park the day before, and she included a playground photo. Caroline described volunteering at an LGBTQ+ youth center as fulfilling and emotionally meaningful, noting she connected with the youth by sharing her own story. Caroline decided she will continue volunteering there and said they are organizing a talent show for the kids next month. Melanie shared photos from a live concert she attended and said the band was named "Summer Sounds," playing an upbeat pop song that got the crowd dancing.

At 1:56 pm on May 8, 2023, Caroline and Melanie exchanged brief messages about the importance of relaxing, expressing themselves, and self-care. Caroline stated she agreed and then said she was leaving to do some research. Melanie echoed the sentiment about taking care of themselves and said she was going swimming with the kids. They ended the exchange indicating they would talk again soon. No specific research topic or location was mentioned.

On 25 May 2023, Melanie reassured Caroline that she has a caring heart and can provide love and stability in a new chapter. On 9 June 2023, Caroline told Melanie about a school event where she spoke about her transgender journey and encouraged students to engage with the LGBTQ community. Caroline reflected that she began transitioning three years earlier and described feeling empowered while sharing struggles and growth since coming out. Melanie repeatedly praised Caroline’s courage and impact in promoting inclusion and allyship. Melanie shared she wants to be courageous for her family and asked what motivates Caroline. Caroline said friends, family, and mentors motivate her, and she shared a photo from a meetup the previous week; Melanie asked how long Caroline has had that support system.

On July 3, 2023, Caroline told Melanie she attended an LGBTQ+ pride parade and felt a strong sense of belonging and community growth. The experience motivated Caroline to use her personal story to help others, reinforcing her interest in counseling and mental health. Melanie shared she had just signed up for a pottery class, describing it as therapeutic and emotionally expressive, and showed photos including a finished black-and-white floral bowl she made. Caroline said she is learning piano as her own creative outlet and encouraged Melanie’s pottery journey. Caroline also said she plans to attend a transgender conference later that month to meet community members and learn more about advocacy. They ended the conversation with Melanie wishing Caroline safety and asking for updates after the conference.

Caroline: I'm keen on counseling or working in mental health - I'd love to support those with similar issues.

retrieved_content: On 6 July 2023, Caroline and Melanie reconnected and shared life updates. Caroline said she has been looking more into counseling or mental health work because she wants to help people and make a positive impact. Melanie described taking her kids to a museum the day before, where they were excited about the dinosaur exhibit. Caroline is building a children’s library for future kids, stocking classics, multicultural stories, and educational books, and asked Melanie about her childhood favorite. Melanie named "Charlotte's Web" as a favorite and highlighted its themes of friendship and compassion. Caroline connected those themes to her own life, explaining that friends and family have been helping her through her transition and mentioning a picnic with them the prior week. Melanie also shared that her family enjoys beach camping together and posted a photo from a campfire on the beach.

On 13 October 2023 at 10:31 am, Caroline told Melanie she contacted her mentor for adoption advice and feels ready to adopt. Melanie said a friend adopted last year, describing it as a long process but ultimately very happy, and asked Caroline for tips. Caroline advised researching agencies or lawyers, gathering documents (references, financial info, medical checks), and preparing emotionally for a difficult wait. Melanie then shared a recent setback: she was hurt last month and had to pause pottery, which she uses for self-expression. To cope, Melanie has been reading a book Caroline previously recommended and painting instead. Melanie shared a sunset-inspired painting and an abstract blue painting aimed at conveying tranquility.

On May 8, 2023, Caroline and Melanie chatted about life updates. Caroline said she attended an LGBTQ support group the day before and found it powerful, especially the transgender stories. She reported the group made her feel accepted and gave her courage to embrace herself. Caroline said she plans to continue her education and explore career options. She is particularly interested in counseling or mental health work to support people with similar issues. Melanie encouraged her and also shared a lake-sunrise painting she made last year as a creative outlet.

At 1:56 pm on May 8, 2023, Caroline and Melanie exchanged brief messages about the importance of relaxing, expressing themselves, and self-care. Caroline stated she agreed and then said she was leaving to do some research. Melanie echoed the sentiment about taking care of themselves and said she was going swimming with the kids. They ended the exchange indicating they would talk again soon. No specific research topic or location was mentioned.

On 12 July 2023, Caroline told Melanie she attended an LGBTQ conference two days earlier and felt welcomed, accepted, and connected with others on similar journeys. The experience strengthened her belief in advocating for trans rights and spreading awareness, while noting there is still progress to be made. Caroline said she is exploring counseling and mental health jobs, motivated by her own past mental health struggles and the support she received. She described books as central to her personal journey and motivation, and named "Becoming Nicole" by Amy Ellis Nutt as especially impactful. Caroline said the book taught her self-acceptance, finding support, and holding onto hope through hard times, and she mentioned that pets bring joy and comfort. Melanie shared she has a dog and a cat.

On 25 May 2023, Melanie told Caroline she ran a charity race for mental health the prior Saturday and found it rewarding and thought-provoking. Melanie said she is prioritizing self-care so she can better care for her family, making daily time for running, reading, or playing violin. Melanie shared that her kids are excited for summer break and her family is considering a camping trip next month. Caroline said her summer plan is researching adoption agencies because she wants to adopt and build a family. Caroline shared that she is considering an agency that supports LGBTQ+ adoption and said she expects challenges as a single parent but feels hopeful and optimistic about giving kids a safe, loving home.

On 23 August 2023 at 3:31 pm, Caroline told Melanie she applied to adoption agencies, marking her first step toward adoption after attending an adoption advice/assistance group. Caroline said she feels excited but nervous about the responsibility of parenting. They chatted about pets: Caroline has a guinea pig named Oscar, and Melanie has a dog named Oliver and a cat named Bailey. Melanie shared a story about Oliver hiding a bone in her slipper and mentioned feeding a horse a carrot. Caroline shared childhood memories of horseback riding with her dad and said she has always loved horses. Both discussed painting: Melanie recently painted a horse, and Caroline shared a self-portrait and described art as therapeutic, identity-exploring, and tied to living authentically and supporting LGBTQ rights.

On Oct 22, 2023, Caroline told Melanie she passed adoption agency interviews the prior Friday and is excited about progressing toward adoption. Caroline described her long-term vision as building her own family by providing a safe, loving home to kids who have lacked one. She framed adoption as a way to give back and to practice love and acceptance for chosen families as well as blood families. Caroline also shared that her transition and self-acceptance were difficult, but support from friends, family, and role models helped her through it. She wants to pass that support forward by helping others grow and find comfort. Melanie expressed encouragement throughout and affirmed mutual support.

On Aug 28, 2023, Caroline and Melanie caught up via chat. Melanie shared she took her kids to a park the day before, and she included a playground photo. Caroline described volunteering at an LGBTQ+ youth center as fulfilling and emotionally meaningful, noting she connected with the youth by sharing her own story. Caroline decided she will continue volunteering there and said they are organizing a talent show for the kids next month. Melanie shared photos from a live concert she attended and said the band was named "Summer Sounds," playing an upbeat pop song that got the crowd dancing.

On 25 August 2023 at 1:33 pm, Caroline told Melanie she went hiking last week, got into a bad situation with some people, and attempted to apologize. Melanie shared she made a flower-themed plate in a pottery class the day before and asked if Caroline had tried pottery. Caroline shared a recently finished painting inspired by a beach visit last week, aiming to capture the calming sunset over the ocean. They reflected on how art creates connection and shared emotional resonance. Melanie mentioned volunteering with her family at a homeless shelter the previous day and feeling it helped make a difference despite the difficulty. Melanie asked about Caroline’s transition; Caroline emphasized the importance of acceptance and support in the transgender community and explained the meaning of a rainbow-flag mural and an eagle symbolizing freedom, pride, and resilience. Melanie ended by asking whether Caroline had made any more art lately.

evidence_texts: Caroline: Researching adoption agencies — it's been a dream to have a family and give a loving home to kids who need it.

retrieved_content: On 6 July 2023, Caroline and Melanie reconnected and shared life updates. Caroline said she has been looking more into counseling or mental health work because she wants to help people and make a positive impact. Melanie described taking her kids to a museum the day before, where they were excited about the dinosaur exhibit. Caroline is building a children’s library for future kids, stocking classics, multicultural stories, and educational books, and asked Melanie about her childhood favorite. Melanie named "Charlotte's Web" as a favorite and highlighted its themes of friendship and compassion. Caroline connected those themes to her own life, explaining that friends and family have been helping her through her transition and mentioning a picnic with them the prior week. Melanie also shared that her family enjoys beach camping together and posted a photo from a campfire on the beach.

On 14 August 2023, Melanie told Caroline she celebrated her daughter’s birthday by attending a concert in a warm summer setting with her kids. Melanie said the concert featured Matt Patterson and praised his voice and songs. Caroline shared that she attended a pride parade the previous Friday and found it inspiring, reinforcing her commitment to equality and LGBTQ rights. Melanie asked how Caroline stays inclusive in her work as an artist. Caroline explained she centers inclusivity and diversity in her art and uses it to advocate for the LGBTQ+ community. Caroline said her art expresses her trans experience, including a piece titled “Embracing Identity,” and described art as a tool for exploring transition, body changes, and self-acceptance, including valuing imperfections.

On Aug 28, 2023, Caroline and Melanie caught up via chat. Melanie shared she took her kids to a park the day before, and she included a playground photo. Caroline described volunteering at an LGBTQ+ youth center as fulfilling and emotionally meaningful, noting she connected with the youth by sharing her own story. Caroline decided she will continue volunteering there and said they are organizing a talent show for the kids next month. Melanie shared photos from a live concert she attended and said the band was named "Summer Sounds," playing an upbeat pop song that got the crowd dancing.

On 15 July 2023, Caroline and Melanie caught up after a busy week. Melanie described taking her kids to a pottery workshop where they made clay pieces, including a cup with a dog face. Melanie also shared that they have been painting together lately, including a nature-themed sunset with a palm tree, and noticing flowers outdoors. Caroline said she attended a council meeting related to adoption on the prior Friday and felt inspired and more determined to adopt. They discussed flowers and their meanings; Caroline noted blue is her favorite color and finds it relaxing. Melanie said flowers symbolize joy and growth for her and were central to her wedding decor, and she highlighted that marrying her partner was the best part of her wedding.

On 13 October 2023 at 10:31 am, Caroline told Melanie she contacted her mentor for adoption advice and feels ready to adopt. Melanie said a friend adopted last year, describing it as a long process but ultimately very happy, and asked Caroline for tips. Caroline advised researching agencies or lawyers, gathering documents (references, financial info, medical checks), and preparing emotionally for a difficult wait. Melanie then shared a recent setback: she was hurt last month and had to pause pottery, which she uses for self-expression. To cope, Melanie has been reading a book Caroline previously recommended and painting instead. Melanie shared a sunset-inspired painting and an abstract blue painting aimed at conveying tranquility.

On 23 August 2023 at 3:31 pm, Caroline told Melanie she applied to adoption agencies, marking her first step toward adoption after attending an adoption advice/assistance group. Caroline said she feels excited but nervous about the responsibility of parenting. They chatted about pets: Caroline has a guinea pig named Oscar, and Melanie has a dog named Oliver and a cat named Bailey. Melanie shared a story about Oliver hiding a bone in her slipper and mentioned feeding a horse a carrot. Caroline shared childhood memories of horseback riding with her dad and said she has always loved horses. Both discussed painting: Melanie recently painted a horse, and Caroline shared a self-portrait and described art as therapeutic, identity-exploring, and tied to living authentically and supporting LGBTQ rights.

On 13 October 2023 at 10:31 am, Caroline told Melanie she attended a poetry reading the previous Friday. Caroline explained it was a transgender poetry reading where transgender people shared their stories through poetry. She emphasized the event felt like a safe space for self-expression and was empowering, with strong energy and supportive posters. Inspired by the experience, Caroline made art—a drawing of a woman in a dress. Caroline said the drawing represents freedom, authenticity, and a reminder to stay true to herself and embrace her womanhood. Melanie responded positively and affirmed the value of self-expression and growing together.

On 13 September 2023 at 12:09 am, Caroline and Melanie catch up after a long time. Caroline shares a beach sunset photo and describes a recent biking day out with friends. Melanie shares a photo from a camping trip with her kids, mentioning forest hiking, marshmallows, and campfire stories. Caroline says her volunteering is motivated by making a difference for the LGBTQ+ community and is supported by friends, family, and mentors, which also fuels her art. They discuss their art histories: Caroline has made art since about age 17, while Melanie has practiced for seven years and focuses on painting and pottery, sharing a photo of bowls. Caroline shares that art helped her explore gender identity and was important during her transition; she also presents a painting symbolizing her path as a trans woman using red/blue to represent and challenge the gender binary. Melanie expresses pride in Caroline and asks how her journey has affected her relationships.

On 25 August 2023 at 1:33 pm, Caroline told Melanie she went hiking last week, got into a bad situation with some people, and attempted to apologize. Melanie shared she made a flower-themed plate in a pottery class the day before and asked if Caroline had tried pottery. Caroline shared a recently finished painting inspired by a beach visit last week, aiming to capture the calming sunset over the ocean. They reflected on how art creates connection and shared emotional resonance. Melanie mentioned volunteering with her family at a homeless shelter the previous day and feeling it helped make a difference despite the difficulty. Melanie asked about Caroline’s transition; Caroline emphasized the importance of acceptance and support in the transgender community and explained the meaning of a rainbow-flag mural and an eagle symbolizing freedom, pride, and resilience. Melanie ended by asking whether Caroline had made any more art lately.

On 25 May 2023, Melanie reassured Caroline that she has a caring heart and can provide love and stability in a new chapter. On 9 June 2023, Caroline told Melanie about a school event where she spoke about her transgender journey and encouraged students to engage with the LGBTQ community. Caroline reflected that she began transitioning three years earlier and described feeling empowered while sharing struggles and growth since coming out. Melanie repeatedly praised Caroline’s courage and impact in promoting inclusion and allyship. Melanie shared she wants to be courageous for her family and asked what motivates Caroline. Caroline said friends, family, and mentors motivate her, and she shared a photo from a meetup the previous week; Melanie asked how long Caroline has had that support system.

evidence_texts: Caroline: The transgender stories were so inspiring! I was so happy and thankful for all the support. [image: a photo of a dog walking past a wall with a painting of a woman]

per_query.question: When did Melanie run a charity race?

candidate_entries.abstract: On July 12, 2023, Melanie shared she got running shoes and has been running more to de-stress and improve her mental health.
candidate_entries.overview: On July 12, 2023 at 4:33 pm, Caroline and Melanie chatted about Melanie’s pets and new running shoes. Melanie said her pets are named Luna and Oliver and described them as sweet and playful. Caroline complimented the purple/pink sneakers and asked whether they were for walking or running. Melanie confirmed the shoes are for running and said she has been running longer/farther since their last chat. She emphasized running helps her de-stress, clear her mind, and has significantly improved her mental health. Caroline encouraged her to keep it up and prioritize self-care.

candidate_entries.abstract: On Aug 17, 2023, Caroline shared a hurtful hiking incident about LGBTQ bias, and she and Melanie supported each other while celebrating Melanie’s new pottery bowl.
candidate_entries.overview: On Aug 17, 2023, Caroline told Melanie about a distressing hike where religious conservatives upset her, reinforcing how much work remains for LGBTQ rights. Melanie responded with empathy and noted how important strong support systems are. Melanie shared a photo of a newly finished pottery bowl with colorful patterns and asked for feedback. Caroline praised the bowl and asked what inspired the colors and patterns; Melanie said she loves bold designs and that painting helps her express feelings and creativity. They reaffirmed mutual appreciation for their friendship and how they help each other through life’s struggles. Caroline referenced having fun together at a Pride fest last year and shared a related group photo.

candidate_entries.abstract: On 15 Jul 2023, Caroline shared that joining a pride parade helped her feel accepted and gave her courage to transition, while Melanie described finding peace through creativity and family support during a move.
candidate_entries.overview: On 15 July 2023, Caroline and Melanie discussed meaningful recent experiences and emotional support. Caroline shared photos and described attending and joining a pride parade a few weeks earlier, calling it a top memory. She said the event made her feel accepted, proud, grateful, and inspired by the love and community around her. Caroline noted that realizing she can be herself without fear gave her the courage to transition. Melanie said she is “getting there” in finding peace, and that creativity and family help her. Caroline asked about Melanie’s move, and Melanie said her family was very supportive and that they also went on another camping trip in the forest.

candidate_entries.abstract: On July 15, 2023, Caroline and Melanie bonded over Melanie’s family hikes in mountains and forests and reaffirmed mutual friendship and support.
candidate_entries.overview: On July 15, 2023 at 1:51 pm, Caroline and Melanie chatted about family activities and support. Caroline asked what Melanie’s family likes doing together, referencing a photo of a family walking through a forest with a toddler. Melanie said they enjoy hiking in the mountains and exploring forests as a way to connect with nature and each other. Caroline responded positively, emphasizing how special nature exploration and family time are. Melanie shared that these outings are among her favorite memories and said they bring happiness and togetherness. The conversation ended with both affirming their friendship and support and Caroline wishing Melanie a good day.

candidate_entries.abstract: On 20 Jul 2023, Caroline shared she joined the “Connected LGBTQ Activists” group to support LGBTQ rights, while Melanie described recent family beach and camping traditions.
candidate_entries.overview: On 17 Jul 2023, Melanie complimented Caroline’s artwork and mentioned she and her kids finished another painting. On 20 Jul 2023, Caroline reconnected and said she joined a new LGBTQ activist group the previous Tuesday. Caroline named the group “Connected LGBTQ Activists” and described regular meetings plus planning events and campaigns to support LGBTQ rights and each other. She noted a city pride parade happened the prior weekend, which she missed but found encouraging for equality and inclusivity. Melanie shared a recent beach trip with her children, noting they go once or twice a year, and showed photos of kids with a kite and a sandcastle. Melanie also described an annual family camping trip and a standout memory from last year seeing the Perseid meteor shower while making wishes.

On 20 Jul 2023, Caroline reconnected and said she joined a new LGBTQ activist group the previous Tuesday. Caroline named the group “Connected LGBTQ Activists” and described regular meetings plus planning events and campaigns to support LGBTQ rights and each other. She noted a city pride parade happened the prior weekend, which she missed but found encouraging for equality and inclusivity. Melanie shared a recent beach trip with her children, noting they go once or twice a year, and showed photos of kids with a kite and a sandcastle. Melanie also described an annual family camping trip and a standout memory from last year seeing the Perseid meteor shower while making wishes.

candidate_entries.abstract: On 6 Jul 2023, Caroline shared her interest in counseling work and described strong support from friends and family during her transition while catching up with Melanie.
candidate_entries.overview: On 6 July 2023, Caroline and Melanie reconnected and shared life updates. Caroline said she has been looking more into counseling or mental health work because she wants to help people and make a positive impact. Melanie described taking her kids to a museum the day before, where they were excited about the dinosaur exhibit. Caroline is building a children’s library for future kids, stocking classics, multicultural stories, and educational books, and asked Melanie about her childhood favorite. Melanie named "Charlotte's Web" as a favorite and highlighted its themes of friendship and compassion. Caroline connected those themes to her own life, explaining that friends and family have been helping her through her transition and mentioning a picnic with them the prior week. Melanie also shared that her family enjoys beach camping together and posted a photo from a campfire on the beach.

retrieved_content: On 25 May 2023, Melanie told Caroline she ran a charity race for mental health the prior Saturday and found it rewarding and thought-provoking. Melanie said she is prioritizing self-care so she can better care for her family, making daily time for running, reading, or playing violin. Melanie shared that her kids are excited for summer break and her family is considering a camping trip next month. Caroline said her summer plan is researching adoption agencies because she wants to adopt and build a family. Caroline shared that she is considering an agency that supports LGBTQ+ adoption and said she expects challenges as a single parent but feels hopeful and optimistic about giving kids a safe, loving home.

On July 12, 2023 at 4:33 pm, Caroline and Melanie chatted about Melanie’s pets and new running shoes. Melanie said her pets are named Luna and Oliver and described them as sweet and playful. Caroline complimented the purple/pink sneakers and asked whether they were for walking or running. Melanie confirmed the shoes are for running and said she has been running longer/farther since their last chat. She emphasized running helps her de-stress, clear her mind, and has significantly improved her mental health. Caroline encouraged her to keep it up and prioritize self-care.

On 15 July 2023, Caroline and Melanie discussed meaningful recent experiences and emotional support. Caroline shared photos and described attending and joining a pride parade a few weeks earlier, calling it a top memory. She said the event made her feel accepted, proud, grateful, and inspired by the love and community around her. Caroline noted that realizing she can be herself without fear gave her the courage to transition. Melanie said she is “getting there” in finding peace, and that creativity and family help her. Caroline asked about Melanie’s move, and Melanie said her family was very supportive and that they also went on another camping trip in the forest.

On Aug 17, 2023, Caroline told Melanie about a distressing hike where religious conservatives upset her, reinforcing how much work remains for LGBTQ rights. Melanie responded with empathy and noted how important strong support systems are. Melanie shared a photo of a newly finished pottery bowl with colorful patterns and asked for feedback. Caroline praised the bowl and asked what inspired the colors and patterns; Melanie said she loves bold designs and that painting helps her express feelings and creativity. They reaffirmed mutual appreciation for their friendship and how they help each other through life’s struggles. Caroline referenced having fun together at a Pride fest last year and shared a related group photo.

On 17 Jul 2023, Melanie complimented Caroline’s artwork and mentioned she and her kids finished another painting. On 20 Jul 2023, Caroline reconnected and said she joined a new LGBTQ activist group the previous Tuesday. Caroline named the group “Connected LGBTQ Activists” and described regular meetings plus planning events and campaigns to support LGBTQ rights and each other. She noted a city pride parade happened the prior weekend, which she missed but found encouraging for equality and inclusivity. Melanie shared a recent beach trip with her children, noting they go once or twice a year, and showed photos of kids with a kite and a sandcastle. Melanie also described an annual family camping trip and a standout memory from last year seeing the Perseid meteor shower while making wishes.

On 25 May 2023, Melanie reassured Caroline that she has a caring heart and can provide love and stability in a new chapter. On 9 June 2023, Caroline told Melanie about a school event where she spoke about her transgender journey and encouraged students to engage with the LGBTQ community. Caroline reflected that she began transitioning three years earlier and described feeling empowered while sharing struggles and growth since coming out. Melanie repeatedly praised Caroline’s courage and impact in promoting inclusion and allyship. Melanie shared she wants to be courageous for her family and asked what motivates Caroline. Caroline said friends, family, and mentors motivate her, and she shared a photo from a meetup the previous week; Melanie asked how long Caroline has had that support system.

On 13 September 2023 at 12:09 am, Caroline and Melanie catch up after a long time. Caroline shares a beach sunset photo and describes a recent biking day out with friends. Melanie shares a photo from a camping trip with her kids, mentioning forest hiking, marshmallows, and campfire stories. Caroline says her volunteering is motivated by making a difference for the LGBTQ+ community and is supported by friends, family, and mentors, which also fuels her art. They discuss their art histories: Caroline has made art since about age 17, while Melanie has practiced for seven years and focuses on painting and pottery, sharing a photo of bowls. Caroline shares that art helped her explore gender identity and was important during her transition; she also presents a painting symbolizing her path as a trans woman using red/blue to represent and challenge the gender binary. Melanie expresses pride in Caroline and asks how her journey has affected her relationships.

On 25 August 2023 at 1:33 pm, Caroline told Melanie she went hiking last week, got into a bad situation with some people, and attempted to apologize. Melanie shared she made a flower-themed plate in a pottery class the day before and asked if Caroline had tried pottery. Caroline shared a recently finished painting inspired by a beach visit last week, aiming to capture the calming sunset over the ocean. They reflected on how art creates connection and shared emotional resonance. Melanie mentioned volunteering with her family at a homeless shelter the previous day and feeling it helped make a difference despite the difficulty. Melanie asked about Caroline’s transition; Caroline emphasized the importance of acceptance and support in the transgender community and explained the meaning of a rainbow-flag mural and an eagle symbolizing freedom, pride, and resilience. Melanie ended by asking whether Caroline had made any more art lately.

On July 15, 2023 at 1:51 pm, Caroline and Melanie chatted about family activities and support. Caroline asked what Melanie’s family likes doing together, referencing a photo of a family walking through a forest with a toddler. Melanie said they enjoy hiking in the mountains and exploring forests as a way to connect with nature and each other. Caroline responded positively, emphasizing how special nature exploration and family time are. Melanie shared that these outings are among her favorite memories and said they bring happiness and togetherness. The conversation ended with both affirming their friendship and support and Caroline wishing Melanie a good day.

On Aug 28, 2023, Caroline and Melanie caught up via chat. Melanie shared she took her kids to a park the day before, and she included a playground photo. Caroline described volunteering at an LGBTQ+ youth center as fulfilling and emotionally meaningful, noting she connected with the youth by sharing her own story. Caroline decided she will continue volunteering there and said they are organizing a talent show for the kids next month. Melanie shared photos from a live concert she attended and said the band was named "Summer Sounds," playing an upbeat pop song that got the crowd dancing.

evidence_texts: Melanie: Hey Caroline, since we last chatted, I've had a lot of things happening to me. I ran a charity race for mental health last Saturday – it was really rewarding. Really made me think about taking care of our minds.

per_query.question: When is Melanie planning on going camping?

candidate_entries.abstract: On Aug 17, 2023, Melanie and Caroline agreed to plan a special summer outing together (not just a family trip).
candidate_entries.overview: On 17 August 2023 at 1:50 pm, Melanie and Caroline chatted after having fun with a group. Melanie proposed doing a family outing during the summer. Caroline agreed and also suggested planning something special for just the two of them to catch up and explore nature. Melanie said that sounded great and confirmed they should plan something special. Caroline expressed excitement about making memories, and Melanie said she would start thinking about what they can do.

candidate_entries.abstract: On July 20, 2023, Melanie shared awe-filled memories of a meteor shower and her youngest child’s first steps, emphasizing gratitude for her family.
candidate_entries.overview: On 20 July 2023 at 8:56 pm, Melanie told Caroline about a night with a clear, star-filled sky and an amazing meteor shower that made her feel small and in awe of the universe. Caroline reacted enthusiastically and asked Melanie to share other memories that make her feel thankful for life. Melanie recalled the day her youngest child took her first steps, describing it as a perspective-shifting milestone about how fleeting life is. Both agreed such milestones highlight how special family bonds are. Melanie concluded that these moments make her appreciate life and feel lucky to have her family’s joy and love. The shared images depict a plane with a smoke trail, a beach with footprints, a baby in a crib, and a family at sunset on a beach.

candidate_entries.abstract: On May 8, 2023 at 1:56 pm, Caroline and Melanie agreed self-care matters; Caroline went to research and Melanie went swimming with her kids.
candidate_entries.overview: At 1:56 pm on May 8, 2023, Caroline and Melanie exchanged brief messages about the importance of relaxing, expressing themselves, and self-care. Caroline stated she agreed and then said she was leaving to do some research. Melanie echoed the sentiment about taking care of themselves and said she was going swimming with the kids. They ended the exchange indicating they would talk again soon. No specific research topic or location was mentioned.

On 25 August 2023 at 1:33 pm, Caroline told Melanie she went hiking last week, got into a bad situation with some people, and attempted to apologize. Melanie shared she made a flower-themed plate in a pottery class the day before and asked if Caroline had tried pottery. Caroline shared a recently finished painting inspired by a beach visit last week, aiming to capture the calming sunset over the ocean. They reflected on how art creates connection and shared emotional resonance. Melanie mentioned volunteering with her family at a homeless shelter the previous day and feeling it helped make a difference despite the difficulty. Melanie asked about Caroline’s transition; Caroline emphasized the importance of acceptance and support in the transgender community and explained the meaning of a rainbow-flag mural and an eagle symbolizing freedom, pride, and resilience. Melanie ended by asking whether Caroline had made any more art lately.

On 13 September 2023 at 12:09 am, Caroline and Melanie catch up after a long time. Caroline shares a beach sunset photo and describes a recent biking day out with friends. Melanie shares a photo from a camping trip with her kids, mentioning forest hiking, marshmallows, and campfire stories. Caroline says her volunteering is motivated by making a difference for the LGBTQ+ community and is supported by friends, family, and mentors, which also fuels her art. They discuss their art histories: Caroline has made art since about age 17, while Melanie has practiced for seven years and focuses on painting and pottery, sharing a photo of bowls. Caroline shares that art helped her explore gender identity and was important during her transition; she also presents a painting symbolizing her path as a trans woman using red/blue to represent and challenge the gender binary. Melanie expresses pride in Caroline and asks how her journey has affected her relationships.

On May 8, 2023, Caroline and Melanie chatted about life updates. Caroline said she attended an LGBTQ support group the day before and found it powerful, especially the transgender stories. She reported the group made her feel accepted and gave her courage to embrace herself. Caroline said she plans to continue her education and explore career options. She is particularly interested in counseling or mental health work to support people with similar issues. Melanie encouraged her and also shared a lake-sunrise painting she made last year as a creative outlet.

On June 27, 2023, Caroline and Melanie reconnected and discussed sentimental objects and recent life updates. Caroline showed a necklace gifted by her grandmother in Sweden, symbolizing love, faith, and strength and reminding her of her roots. She also mentioned a hand-painted bowl made by a friend for her 18th birthday about ten years earlier. Melanie shared that she recently took her family camping in the mountains, where they roasted marshmallows and hiked to a scenic view. Caroline then shared a career direction: she is exploring counseling and mental health work, motivated by her own journey and the support she received. She attended an LGBTQ+ counseling workshop the previous Friday and is considering specializing in supporting trans people by creating safe, affirming spaces.

On 12 July 2023, Caroline told Melanie she attended an LGBTQ conference two days earlier and felt welcomed, accepted, and connected with others on similar journeys. The experience strengthened her belief in advocating for trans rights and spreading awareness, while noting there is still progress to be made. Caroline said she is exploring counseling and mental health jobs, motivated by her own past mental health struggles and the support she received. She described books as central to her personal journey and motivation, and named "Becoming Nicole" by Amy Ellis Nutt as especially impactful. Caroline said the book taught her self-acceptance, finding support, and holding onto hope through hard times, and she mentioned that pets bring joy and comfort. Melanie shared she has a dog and a cat.

evidence_texts: Caroline: Yeah, I'm really lucky to have them. They've been there through everything, I've known these friends for 4 years, since I moved from my home country. Their love and help have been so important especially after that tough breakup. I'm super thankful. Who supports you, Mel?
Caroline: I'm thrilled to make a family for kids who need one. It'll be tough as a single parent, but I'm up for the challenge!

per_query.question: When did Caroline give a speech at a school?

candidate_entries.abstract: [6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Melanie]: Thanks, Caroline!
candidate_entries.overview:
[6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Melanie]: Thanks, Caroline! Yup, we just did it yesterday! The kids loved it and it was a nice way to relax after the road trip.

[6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Caroline]: Glad you got some R&R after the drive. Nature sure seems to refresh us, huh?

[6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Melanie]: Absolutely! It really helps me reset and recharge. I love camping trips with my fam, 'cause nature brings such peace and serenity. [image: a photo of a sunset over a body of water]

[6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Caroline]: Wow, that's awesome! What do you love most about camping with your fam?

[6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Melanie]: It's a chance to be present and together. We bond over stories, campfires and nature. It's so peaceful waking up to the sound of birds and the smell of fresh air - it always refreshes my soul.

[6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Caroline]: That's so peaceful and calming, Melanie! I can picture waking up to nature. It's great that you get to spend quality, tranquil time with your family.

[6:55 pm on 20 October, 2023] [Melanie]: Thanks, Caroline! This is a great time. Nature and quality time, can't beat it!

candidate_entries.abstract: [1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023] [Caroline]: Thanks, Mel!
candidate_entries.overview:
[1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023] [Caroline]: Thanks, Mel! I made this stained glass window to remind myself and others that within us all is the key to discovering our true potential and living our best life. [image: a photo of three stained glass windows in a church with a clock]

[1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023] [Melanie]: Wow, Caroline, that looks amazing! What inspired it?

[1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023] [Caroline]: Thanks! It was made for a local church and shows time changing our lives. I made it to show my own journey as a transgender woman and how we should accept growth and change. [image: a photo of a large stained glass window in a church]

[1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023] [Melanie]: Wow, Caroline!  All those colors are incredible and the story it tells is so inspiring. [image: a photo of a door with a stained glass window and a coat rack]

[1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023] [Caroline]: Thanks, Mel! Glad you like it. It's a symbol of togetherness, to celebrate differences and be that much closer. I'd love to make something like this next! [image: a photo of a painted sidewalk with a rainbow design on it]

[1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023] [Melanie]: Wow, that's gorgeous! Where did you find it?
